selected_finding.title: Incomplete cloning of mutable options
selected_finding.fix_summary: Add body cloning to the cloneInitHookOptions function by including `body: cloneShallow(options.body)` in the cloned options object. This prevents init hooks from mutating the body and affecting subsequent requests.
